problem: What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient
hypothesis: If Dopamine/serotonin reuptake inhibition with specificity is applied to alone, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
